description: Address critical review issues: session ownership check, BulkWrite for UpsertProposalRefs, KG edge labels, and semantic search scoping in CitationGate.
steps: Add session ownership check in proposal_handler.go - compare session.UserID against authenticated user from request context for all relevant endpoints
Replace sequential UpdateOne loop with BulkWrite in UpsertProposalRefs (mongo.go)
Fix KG edge labels in p0_ingest.go: AUTHORED for author-paper, SAME_AUTHOR for same-author paper links, classify keywords with heuristics
Fix semantic search scoping in citation_gate.go to verify specific cited paper appears in results by matching cite_key against DOI/title
acceptance_criteria: All proposal session endpoints verify session.UserID matches authenticated user, return 403 on mismatch
Author-to-paper edges use AUTHORED label, same-author paper links use SAME_AUTHOR
Keywords classified with heuristics: dataset -> Dataset, method/algorithm -> Method, else -> Concept
CitationGate semantic check verifies specific cited paper by matching cite_key/DOI/title in results
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/nsa && go build ./...` and confirm exit code 0
